questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Select the correct statement(s) about the solubility of LiF and CsI in water
options: LiF is highly soluble due to high hydration enthalpy
LiF is sparingly soluble due to high lattice enthalpy
Csl is highly soluble due to low lattice enthalpy
Csl is sparingly soluble due to low hydration enthalpy
questions.solution:
Answer (B, D)
Both LiF and Csl are sparingly soluble due to high lattice energy of former and low hydration enthalpy of latter.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Li shows anomalous behaviour to other alkali metals which can be attributed to its high charge density. Select the correct statement(s) about lithium.
options: Lithium does not form the nitride on reaction with $\mathrm{N}_2$
Lithium does not form the solid hydrogen carbonate
Lithium chloride does not crystallise as a hydrate
questions.solution:
Answer (A, C)
Li forms $\mathrm{Li}_3 \mathrm{~N}$ and LiCl precipitates as $\mathrm{LiCl} .2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
